headline: West Appoints Michel Lagarde to be President and Chief Executive Officer
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST), a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, today announced that its Board of Directors has appointed Michel Lagarde to be President and Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and a member of the Company's Board of Directors starting August 31, 2026. He succeeds Eric M. Green, who will retire from his roles as President, CEO and Board Chair on that date. The Company also announced as part of the CEO transition that the Board

headline: NTRA & Diakonos Partner to Use Signatera in Refractory Melanoma Trial
summary: Natera teams with Diakonos to use Signatera MRD testing in a refractory melanoma immunotherapy trial, tracking ctDNA to gauge response.

raw.headline: NTRA & Diakonos Partner to Use Signatera in Refractory Melanoma Trial

headline: PacBio Expands HiFi Sequencing Reach With New SPRQ-Nx Technology
summary: PACB expands HiFi sequencing reach with commercial availability of SPRQ-Nx for Revio, lowering costs by about 30% and adding AI and epigenetics upgrades.

raw.headline: PacBio Expands HiFi Sequencing Reach With New SPRQ-Nx Technology
